name: Fresh Cherry Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a 9-inch pie pan with the pastry.
2. Combine cherries, sugar, flour, and almond extract in a bowl.
3. Pour the mixture into the unbaked pie shell.
4. Dot the top of the filling with butter.
5. Cover with the top crust and seal the edges.
6. Cut slits in the center of the crust to allow steam to escape.
7. Bake at 400°F for about 40 to 50 minutes, or until done.
To freeze:
Omit baking and wrap securely.
To serve:
Bake frozen pie at 400°F from 55 minutes to 1 hour and 10 minutes, or until done.
